title: CFTR / elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor
summary: Patients with the rs75039782 CT genotype (one copy of the CFTR 3849+10kbC>T variant) and cystic fibrosis may respond to ivacaftor or elexacaftor / tezacaftor / ivacaftor treatment.
